title: Vulnerability Datasets for Software Security: A Survey of Existing Resources, Challenges, and Future Directions
data:
T Karim, MS Akter- Computers & Security, 2026
Software vulnerabilities remain a major threat to modern software systems, and 
recent advances in Machine Learning (ML), Deep Learning (DL), and Large 
Language Models (LLMs) have intensified interest in automated vulnerability 
detection. At the core of these techniques are vulnerability datasets, which provide 
the training and evaluation foundations for developing and benchmarking detection 
models. This survey presents a structured review of existing vulnerability datasets
